content.speakerText: Your new flight is confirmed for the 15th at 10 a.m. You'll get an email shortly.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的新航班已确认，15号上午10点，稍后会发邮件。

options.text: Great! Can you send me the receipt now?
Thank you so much — you’ve saved me!
I don’t think this time works for me.
Can you change it again? I need a later flight.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thank you so much — you’ve saved me!' 是对服务成功完成的自然、礼貌的感谢回应，符合道别确认场景。其他选项要么提出新请求（opt_1, opt_4），要么否定确认（opt_3），不符合语境。

content.speakerText: Your reservation has been successfully updated. The boarding pass will be emailed to you.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的预订已成功更新，登机牌将通过邮件发送。

options.text: Okay, I’ll call you back if there’s a problem.
Thanks for your help. Have a great day!
Why didn’t you confirm it earlier?
Can you upgrade my seat now?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks for your help. Have a great day!' 是礼貌、自然的结束语，符合道别确认场景。opt_1 和 opt_4 引入新请求，opt_3 表达抱怨，均不符合积极结束对话的语境。

content.speakerText: All changes are processed. You’re all set for your trip.
content.speakerTextCn: 所有变更已处理完毕，您的行程已安排妥当。

options.text: Do I need to check in online?
Can you confirm my baggage allowance?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Perfect! Thanks a lot. Goodbye!' 表达了满意、感谢和礼貌道别，是道别确认场景的典型回应。opt_1 语气消极，opt_3 和 opt_4 提出新问题，打断对话结束流程。
